keys.meta_description: Complete your company and contact details for manual trial approval.
keys.intro_company: Complete the steps below so we can review your organization for manual trial approval.
keys.session_error: Start from the trial page and tap “Start Manual Onboarding”, or open the link from your email.
keys.err_restart_failed: Could not restart your session. Please go back to the trial page.
keys.success_title: Success! Your Application is Under Review.
keys.success_body: Thank you for providing your business details. To ensure the highest level of security and performance, our engineering team is now preparing your dedicated server instance.
keys.success_next_0_body: We will review your business registration and LinkedIn profile within 24 hours.
keys.success_next_1_body: Once verified, a private server-based environment will be isolated and deployed exclusively for your company.
keys.success_next_2_body: You will receive an activation link via the work email you provided.
keys.success_patience: We appreciate your patience as we build a secure foundation for your operations.
keys.success_email_sent: A confirmation email has been sent to your work email.
keys.success_redirect_message: You will be returned to our homepage shortly.
keys.redirect_link: Click here if you are not redirected
